scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port ${API_PORT:-8000}; else python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port ${API_PORT:-8000}; fi
scripts.start:api: cd apps/api && if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${API_PORT:-8000}; else python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${API_PORT:-8000}; fi
